samples.text: An ice cube stays frozen inside a burning fire. Is this expected based on common sense?
An ice cube remains frozen in a roaring fire. Does this match everyday common sense?
A block of ice stays solid inside an open flame. Is this expected based on common sense?
Fire melts ice. An ice cube in fire would melt, not stay frozen. Is the described situation expected based on common sense?
An ice cube stays frozen inside a burning fire. A blue car is parked outside. Is this expected based on common sense?
